case_title: WESTLAKE HOUSING CAPITAL FUND I,LP F/K/A KEYCORP VS. OAKWOOD PARKER PLACE LC et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE HOUSING CAPITAL FUND I,LP F/K/A KEYCORP INVESTMENT LIMITED PARTNERSHIP III PARKER PLACE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OAKWOOD PARKER PLACE LC KOSTOSKY, THOMAS J MOULTON, CRAIG $327,006.29 PRINCIPAL, $53,755.00 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $381,131.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
